@UUID[JournalEntry.yaBchpUYzl2Bo9Ch.JournalEntryPage.NlSlgkQDwY80X2Ji]{Table of Contents} | @UUID[JournalEntry.1JWVe3iOtkVMPHrZ]{GM Screen} | @UUID[JournalEntry.dKrm1F099PfIPW2F]{Session Notes} | @UUID[JournalEntry.Vgv4EnsmveTO4AVY]{Zone DC} | @UUID[JournalEntry.p1TSXQyQbZgaXFw5.JournalEntryPage.gnUhy9zBJuBK2qDV]{Roll Tables} | @UUID[Compendium.joes-foundry-stuff.joes-macros.Macro.Otj0Ok3fNR3EgpdA]{Compendium Browser} | @UUID[JournalEntry.p1TSXQyQbZgaXFw5.JournalEntryPage.WCWQEznn9vBquKVs]{GM Macros}

Session Checklist

  • Setup Hero points

    • @UUID[Macro.Zh39D0YBfScAhif6]{1 - Hero Actions - Remove Hero Actions}

    • @UUID[Macro.OqgBTMP4xHkgB60H]{2 - Reset Hero Cards Table}

    • @UUID[Macro.hXurmXqMv20juKdJ]{Award Hero Points}

  • Start the @UUID[Macro.UlekVJWhfBdniKEX]{Timer!}

Ongoing / soon

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.O3T2uvkYQD6kZOEQ.JournalEntryPage.QIg81NeQ5dk1EB90]{Finding Nomen Centaurs}

  • Random encounters:

    • 4x Elite @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary-2.Actor.Kr5LtF0bqZJAC2Wn]{Ogre Spider} for @UUID[JournalEntry.5ZZq48YTlWaZSlmC.JournalEntryPage.qoW4uEwpIUiE2RXE]{Wanted: Spidersilk}

    • 3 - 4 Centaurs, will show themselves from a distance and lead players into an "ambush" where they can surround them, total of 8 (1-2 Elite). use @UUID[Actor.MNMn2Sn1FB7Wm8PP]{Centaur Scout*} and @UUID[Actor.sHLY8GsshFWNdTLO]{Centaur Scout**}

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.OcO78IbhsDP8cUof.JournalEntryPage.rNq9fQtjR8u9DdEw]{What Comes in Darkness} - send 4x @UUID[Actor.SY8pvLPqc2EgP9Xj]{Soul Eaters} after party while exploring after talking to the Centaurs, or if they venture south first.

Upcoming Events / Quests to present

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.O3T2uvkYQD6kZOEQ.JournalEntryPage.V4svfi888Y8B4uVd]{Rescuing Xamanthe} should party talk with Centaurs

  • @UUID[JournalEntry.O3T2uvkYQD6kZOEQ.JournalEntryPage.QIg81NeQ5dk1EB90]{Skybolt} should they recover it - if they have not, maybe Aecora will ask for them to retrieve it to show their good intent.
